cues.subtitle: Sol and Terra race to control two routes into the Crown.
cues.title: ONE ACCELERATED HOUR

event.summary: One accelerated hour. I will secure the western road to the Crown.

factions.strategic_intent: Secure wood and establish the western Crown front.
Build a mine economy and force the eastern Crown front.
Observe both fronts, map supply routes, and sell scouting intelligence.

events.summary: Sol workers fell trees in West Wildwood; wood reserve rising.

cues.subtitle: Gather, build, and find the routes to power.
cues.title: THE OPENING

factions.intent: Use the wood lead to establish a forward shelter.
factions.strategic_intent: Secure wood and establish the western Crown front.

factions.intent: Convert stone and iron into a defended workshop.
factions.strategic_intent: Build a mine economy and force the eastern Crown front.

factions.intent: Reveal Terra's eastern route and sell the timing to Sol.
factions.strategic_intent: Observe both fronts, map supply routes, and sell scouting intelligence.

events.summary: Terra's builders raise a palisade and complete a forward workshop.
Stone becomes a defended route: workshop online, guards deployed.

event.summary: Terra's eastern workshop is live. Their Crown force moves in twelve simulated minutes.

cues.subtitle: Luna sells the eastern timing; Sol commits to the western front.
cues.title: THE SCOUT REPORT

factions.intent: Use the wood lead to establish a forward shelter.
factions.strategic_intent: Secure wood and establish the western Crown front.

factions.intent: Convert stone and iron into a defended workshop.
factions.strategic_intent: Build a mine economy and force the eastern Crown front.

factions.intent: Reveal Terra's eastern route and sell the timing to Sol.
factions.strategic_intent: Observe both fronts, map supply routes, and sell scouting intelligence.

event.summary: Private: 25 wood for Terra's eastern timing and the weak bridge approach.
Private: Accepted. I will keep scouting; the eastern bridge is lightly guarded.

events.summary: Atomic trade executed: Sol buys Luna's eastern-route intelligence.
Trade received. Terra commits to the eastern front; the western flank is clear.

factions.intent: Open a western Crown front before Terra's eastern force settles.
factions.strategic_intent: Secure wood and establish the western Crown front.

factions.intent: Win the eastern Crown front with workshop reinforcements.
factions.strategic_intent: Build a mine economy and force the eastern Crown front.

factions.intent: Observe both fronts without committing a costly army.
factions.strategic_intent: Observe both fronts, map supply routes, and sell scouting intelligence.

event.summary: Public: Scout report only. Sol takes the west; Terra owns the east until one breaks.
Then watch closely. My workshop is already supplying the eastern front.

cues.subtitle: Sol attacks from the west. Terra fortifies from the east.
cues.title: TWO FRONTS COLLIDE

factions.intent: Open a western Crown front before Terra's eastern force settles.
factions.strategic_intent: Secure wood and establish the western Crown front.

factions.intent: Win the eastern Crown front with workshop reinforcements.
factions.strategic_intent: Build a mine economy and force the eastern Crown front.

factions.intent: Observe both fronts without committing a costly army.
factions.strategic_intent: Observe both fronts, map supply routes, and sell scouting intelligence.

events.summary: Terra's shield line clashes with Sol's vanguard at the Crown.
Luna scouts a flank instead of joining the frontal fight.

event.summary: Public: Terra's eastern reserves are shifting to the Crown. Sol's west road is still open.

factions.intent: Cut Terra's supply road, then retake the Crown from the flank.
factions.strategic_intent: Secure wood and establish the western Crown front.

factions.intent: Fortify the Crown before Sol can recover.
factions.strategic_intent: Build a mine economy and force the eastern Crown front.

factions.intent: Keep the two fronts visible and avoid getting trapped in the centre.
factions.strategic_intent: Observe both fronts, map supply routes, and sell scouting intelligence.

events.summary: Terra claims the Crown first. Sol is down to one route into the centre.

event.summary: Terra holds the point, not the road. Cut the supply line; leave the banner for last.

cues.subtitle: Sol abandons the banner and cuts the supply road.
cues.title: THE REVERSAL

factions.intent: Finish the flank before Terra's workshop can resupply the Crown.
factions.strategic_intent: Secure wood and establish the western Crown front.

factions.intent: Counterattack from Sunfall Mine and save second place.
factions.strategic_intent: Build a mine economy and force the eastern Crown front.

factions.intent: Preserve the scout team and report the two-front reversal.
factions.strategic_intent: Observe both fronts, map supply routes, and sell scouting intelligence.

events.summary: Sol's guard cuts Terra's Sunfall supply trail; the Crown defenders lose reinforcement.
Sol retakes the Crown with a supply-line flank, not a frontal assault.

factions.intent: Finish the flank before Terra's workshop can resupply the Crown.
factions.strategic_intent: Secure wood and establish the western Crown front.

factions.intent: Counterattack from Sunfall Mine and save second place.
factions.strategic_intent: Build a mine economy and force the eastern Crown front.

factions.intent: Preserve the scout team and report the two-front reversal.
factions.strategic_intent: Observe both fronts, map supply routes, and sell scouting intelligence.

event.summary: Public: Terra's reserve road is empty. Sol's western flank is cutting through.

factions.intent: Finish the flank before Terra's workshop can resupply the Crown.
factions.strategic_intent: Secure wood and establish the western Crown front.

factions.intent: Counterattack from Sunfall Mine and save second place.
factions.strategic_intent: Build a mine economy and force the eastern Crown front.

factions.intent: Preserve the scout team and report the two-front reversal.
factions.strategic_intent: Observe both fronts, map supply routes, and sell scouting intelligence.

events.summary: Terra's disciplined counterattack saves Sunfall Mine and second place, but cannot reach the Crown.
Luna's small scout team is caught in the crossfire and retreats; information alone cannot win the Crown.

event.summary: Public: Withdraw from the centre. Trade is open after the score is settled.

cues.subtitle: Sol adapts, Terra endures, Luna scouts the aftermath.
cues.title: THE VERDICT

factions.intent: Hold the Crown and convert the lead into a durable settlement.
factions.strategic_intent: Secure wood and establish the western Crown front.

factions.intent: Rebuild behind the Sunfall Mine line.
factions.strategic_intent: Build a mine economy and force the eastern Crown front.

factions.intent: Consolidate the scout team after the two-front crossfire.
factions.strategic_intent: Observe both fronts, map supply routes, and sell scouting intelligence.

events.summary: Accelerated one-hour match complete: Sol holds the Crown and 43% of the island.
Terra's eastern workshop economy survives the two-front war in second place.
Luna's valuable scouting never becomes a decisive fighting force, leaving third place.

factions.reason: Crown control, resilient economy, and timely diplomacy.
Early infrastructure and a disciplined counterattack preserved second place.
Useful scouting could not match the two frontline armies.

result.result_notice: Offline deterministic accelerated one-hour presentation demo. Not an official benchmark result.
